items.builder_takeaway: A solo dev describes building a link-in-bio / landing page builder that hit 300 users in 2 months. The post is a self-promotional milestone update with no technical substance, no pricing data, and no actionable takeaway for other builders.
source_facts: A landing page builder called Clinnk reached 300 users in 2 months as a first shipped product.
items.title: My first shipped product crossed 300 users within 2 months

items.builder_takeaway: Promotional post for Glotier, a SaaS visibility tool. No substantive content — just a link to the product and a question about finding first users. Pure self-promotion.
source_facts: Glotier is a tool to make new products visible online, at stores, and in AI results.
items.title: Hello, about Saas Visibility

items.builder_takeaway: High-severity supply chain attack with real credential harvesting risk. Any developer using AUR packages needs to audit immediately.
source_facts: Over 400 Arch Linux AUR packages were compromised in a supply chain attack using eBPF rootkit payloads for credential harvesting, rated CVSS 8.7.
items.title: Arch Linux AUR Hit By Another Wave Of Now More Sophisticated Malware Attack
items.uncertainty: Exact scope may still be expanding — initial reports said 400, some sources suggest up to 1500 packages across multiple waves.

items.builder_takeaway: Directly relevant to anyone building agent workflows or using AI coding tools. The smart/dumb zone framing is a practical design heuristic.
source_facts: Effective LLM context window performance degrades well before the advertised limit, with useful context around ~100k tokens regardless of the marketed window size.
items.title: Don't trust large context windows
items.uncertainty: The ~100k figure is approximate and model-dependent. Published May 6 but trending on HN June 14.

items.builder_takeaway: Directly addresses cost management for AI coding, a top concern for solo developers.
source_facts: For most solo developers, renting open-source models via API is more cost-effective than self-hosting, which only pays off with sustained high utilization.
items.title: AI coding at home without going broke
items.uncertainty: Full article not read — scoring based on HN discussion and summary.

items.builder_takeaway: A deep-dive into the challenges of rendering Arabic text, covering bidirectional layout, ligature shaping, and accumulated technical debt in text rendering stacks. Technically interesting but niche — unless you're building multilingual text rendering, this doesn't change any decisions.
source_facts: Arabic typography rendering has accumulated significant technical debt in modern text rendering stacks.
items.title: The experience of rendering Arabic typography and its technical debt
items.uncertainty: Full article not read — scoring based on title.
